common.comingSoonDesc: This section is under development. Check back for updates.

layout.title: West Bengal State Dashboard
layout.description: Interactive data dashboard for West Bengal - demographics, climate, air quality, health, education, crime, transport, budget, and geographic insights from open data sources.
layout.footer: Data from NFHS-5, RGI Projections, SRS, India Meteorological Dept (IMD), NCRB, UDISE+, PRS India, VAHAN, WB Finance Dept, and Open-Meteo

home.pageDesc: 10 domains, 30+ open data sources, 23 districts. What does the data say about West Bengal?

climate.pageDesc: Rainfall patterns, temperature trends, and extreme weather events across West Bengal's 23 districts.

environment.pageDesc: Air Quality Index monitoring across major cities in West Bengal — PM2.5, PM10, NO2, SO2, and other pollutants.

health.pageDesc: Healthcare infrastructure, maternal & child health indicators, and disease burden across West Bengal.

education.pageDesc: School infrastructure, enrollment trends, learning outcomes, and teacher metrics from UDISE+ data.

crime.pageDesc: Crime statistics, trends, and safety indicators from NCRB data for West Bengal.

transport.pageDesc: Road network, vehicle registrations, public transport usage, and road safety in West Bengal.

budget.pageDesc: Revenue sources, expenditure patterns, fiscal deficits, and debt status of West Bengal state government.

demographics.pageDesc: Population projections, female literacy, child nutrition, household amenities, and vital statistics for West Bengal.

map.pageDesc: Interactive district-level map of West Bengal with NFHS-5 indicators — sex ratio, literacy, immunization, and more.
